# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Cross-account IAM Role for CI/CD with wildcard trust for AWS Organizations accounts
Parameters:
  RoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: cicd-cross-account-role
  OrgId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organizations ID (e.g., o-xxxxxxxxxx)
  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional ExternalId required for AssumeRole. Leave blank to disable.
  PermissionsPolicyArns:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional managed policy ARNs to attach (comma-separated). Leave blank for none.
Conditions:
  HasExternalId: !Not [!Equals [!Ref ExternalId, '']]
  HasPermissionsPolicyArns: !Not [!Equals [!Join ['', !Ref PermissionsPolicyArns], '']]
Resources:
  CiCdCrossAccountRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref RoleName
      Path: /
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAssumeFromOrgAccounts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:TagSession
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref OrgId
              StringLike:
                aws:PrincipalArn:
                  - arn:aws:iam::*:role/*
                  - arn:aws:sts::*:assumed-role/*/*
              ForAnyValue:StringLikeIfExists:
                aws:TagKeys:
                  - '*'
              Fn::If:
                - HasExternalId
                - StringEquals:
                    sts:ExternalId: !Ref ExternalId
                - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      ManagedPolicyArns: !If
        - HasPermissionsPolicyArns
        - !Ref PermissionsPolicyArns
        - !Ref AWS::NoValue
Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Value: !GetAtt CiCdCrossAccountRole.Arn
  RoleName:
    Value: !Ref CiCdCrossAccountRole
